title: Strict Typing, Nullability, and Boundary Validation · Failure Case: Strict Mode
summary: Establish a strict type baseline without confusing static types with runtime validation. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates strict mode increment in a strict type and boundary contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Enable the language or checker strict baseline and document intentional deviations.
Review new, removed, renamed, and changed rules during tool upgrades.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Build Strict Mode evidence
